# MultiRoundTrip.RequestStateCodec.Encode method

Encodes a continuation token capturing *round* (§11.3). The result is an opaque base64url string the client echoes verbatim on retry.

```csharp
public static string Encode(int round)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| round | The number of input rounds completed so far (non-negative). |

## Return Value

The opaque token.
